output: Executed batch 4 for T8. Added task-path coverage for placement threading in `create-task.test.ts`, completion-time insertion behavior in `handler.test.ts`, and a new harness scenario for editing a selected image and inserting the result after the source clip. The create-task tool now also omits `timeline_placement` entirely when the agent does not specify it so the new omission assertion reflects actual request construction. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-for-timeline-20260410-0114/execution_batch_4.json`.
deviations: T8 required one supporting implementation tweak beyond the planned file list: `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/create-task.ts` now conditionally includes `timeline_placement` only when the agent supplied one, matching the new omission-path assertion.

The standard edge Vitest config excludes `supabase/functions/_tests/**/*.test.ts`, so harness verification was rerun with `config/testing/vitest.edge.smoke.config.ts` after the first edge-config attempt matched no harness test files.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added create-task tests that assert `executeCreateTask()` forwards `timeline_placement` when present and omits it when absent, added complete_task handler tests that verify timeline insertion is attempted for stored placement intent and that completion still succeeds with a degraded follow-up when insertion fails, and added a harness case that selects a timeline-backed clip and expects task params to include `timeline_placement` plus downstream generation and timeline insertion effects. Verification: full `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/create-task.test.ts`, `supabase/functions/complete_task/handler.test.ts`, and smoke `supabase/functions/_tests/harness/harness.test.ts` passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Added a harness case that selects a timeline-backed clip, leaves `skipTaskCompletion` unset so the runner waits for async task side effects, and asserts the resulting task params contain `timeline_placement`, a generation is created, and a media clip is added on the source track after completion.
